memoryArtifacts.headline: Cowthally Castle, Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland
memoryArtifacts.description:
Cowthally Castle, view of a ruined overgrown castle with remnants of a round tower to the left, on a hill-top with a stream running into the foreground to right, a spire among trees in the distance to right and mountains in the background; illustration to Scott's edition of Somerville's 'Memorie of the Somervilles ...'. 1815
Print made by: Richard Rhodes

zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Somerville 2nd Lord Sommerville於1392年出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾卡瓦斯時，他的父親Thomas Somerville 1st. Lord of Somerville22歲，母親Janet Stewart68歲。他於1411年11月2日與Johanna Mowat在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾卡瓦斯結婚。他去世於1456年8月20日在他的家鄉享年64歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾卡瓦斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Somerville 2nd Lord Sommerville于1392年出生在苏格兰藍納可爾卡瓦斯时，他的父亲Thomas Somerville 1st. Lord of Somerville22岁，母亲Janet Stewart68岁。他于1411年11月2日与Johanna Mowat在英国苏格兰藍納可爾卡瓦斯结婚。他去世于1456年8月20日在他的家乡享年64岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰藍納可爾卡瓦斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Somerville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Graveron-Sémerville in Eure (Normandy), from the ancient Germanic personal name Sigimar (see Siemer ) + Old French ville ‘settlement’. The surname was taken to Scotland in the 12th century by William de Somerville, a retainer of David, Earl of Huntingdon, who became King David I of Scotland.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Somacháin (see Summers ) or Mag Shamradháin (see Somers ).

variants.name: Siemer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Helmuth, Otto, Theresia.
German: from the ancient Germanic personal name Siegmar, composed of the elements sigi ‘victory’ + mari, meri ‘famous’.

variants.name: Summerville
meanings: English, Scottish (Lanarkshire), and Irish: variant of   Somerville  . This form of the surname is particularly common in Ireland.

variants.name: Simrell
meanings: Scottish: perhaps related to the Ulster nameSumeril, a variant of Somerville .

variants.name: Summerfield
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called with Old English sumor ‘summer’ + feld ‘field, open land’, denoting summer pasture or fields cultivated only in summer, such as Summerfield in Woodnesborough (Kent), Somerfield Court in Sellindge (Kent), and Summerfield in Marlborough (Wiltshire).
Americanized form (translation into English) of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Sommerfeld  , a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Somerville 2nd Lord Sommerville was born in 1392, in Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland, his father, Thomas Somerville 1st. Lord of Somerville, was 22 and his mother, Janet Stewart, was 68. He married Johanna Mowat on 2 November 1411, in Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. He died on 20 August 1456, in his hometown, at the age of 64, and was buried in Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Somerville 2nd Lord Sommerville est né en 1392, à Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Écosse, son père, Thomas Somerville 1st. Lord of Somerville, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Janet Stewart, avait 68 ans. Il a épousé Johanna Mowat le 2 novembre 1411, à Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 20 août 1456, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Somerville 2nd Lord Sommerville 1392 in Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Somerville 1st. Lord of Somerville 22 und seine Mutter Janet Stewart 68. Er hat am 2. November 1411 in Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Johanna Mowat geheiratet. Er starb am 20. August 1456 im Alter von 64 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Somerville 2nd Lord Sommerville è nato il nel 1392 nel Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Thomas Somerville 1st. Lord of Somerville, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Janet Stewart, aveva 68 anni. Lui sposato Johanna Mowat il 2 novembre 1411, nel Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Morì il 20 agosto 1456, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Somerville 2nd Lord Sommervilleが1392年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアカーンワスで生まれた時，父Thomas Somerville 1st. Lord of Somervilleは22歳，母Janet Stewartは68歳であった。1411年11月2日にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアカーンワスでJohanna Mowatと結婚した。彼は1456年8月20日に故郷で64歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアカーンワスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Somerville 2nd Lord Sommerville(이)가 1392년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 카른왓h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Somerville 1st. Lord of Somerville(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Janet Stewart(은)는 68세였다. 그는 1411년 11월 2일 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 카른왓h에서 Johanna Mowat(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1456년 8월 20일 그의 고향에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 카른왓h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Somerville 2nd Lord Sommerville nasceu em 1392, em Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland, seu pai, Thomas Somerville 1st. Lord of Somerville, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Janet Stewart, tinha 68 anos. Ele casou-se com Johanna Mowat em 2 de novembro de 1411, em Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 20 de agosto de 1456, em sua cidade natal, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Somerville 2nd Lord Sommerville родился в 1392 г. в местности карнват, ланаркшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Thomas Somerville 1st. Lord of Somerville было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Janet Stewart, 68. Он женился на женщине по имени Johanna Mowat 2 ноября 1411 г. в местности карнват, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. Он умер 20 августа 1456 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности карнват, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Somerville 2nd Lord Sommerville nació en 1392, en Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland, su papá, Thomas Somerville 1st. Lord of Somerville, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Janet Stewart, tenía 68 años. Se casó con Johanna Mowat el 2 de noviembre de 1411, en Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Murió el 20 de agosto de 1456, en su pueblo, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
